notes: The cyclic Modbus TCP exchange is backed by the local Invertek documents.
No vendor-hosted OPT-2-MODIP-IN user guide was recovered during the audit.
The configured listen address and unit ID are simulator choices rather than Invertek-documented defaults.
The configured port falls back to Modbus TCP default 502 because no Invertek-specific port override was verified.

descriptions: Drive control word, Modbus TCP register 1
Frequency setpoint, Modbus TCP register 2, scaling 500 = 50.0 Hz
Torque setpoint or user-selected value, Modbus TCP register 3, scaling 1000 = 100.0%
Fieldbus ramps or user-selected value, Modbus TCP register 4, scaling 3000 = 30.0 s
Drive status word, Modbus TCP register 256
Output frequency, Modbus TCP register 257, scaling 500 = 50.0 Hz
Output current or user-selected value, Modbus TCP register 258, scaling 100 = 10.0 A
Output torque or user-selected value, Modbus TCP register 259, scaling 1000 = 100.0%
